executive_summary: Eleven clients tracked this week, with six flagged for attention due to stalled work or pending client responses. Quality HVAC and Steel Round Bars show the longest delays (30+ and 9+ days), while Full Smile's CRM sync bug remains unresolved for eight days. New activity includes Full Smile's GBP work launch, MedStation's content production plan, and Cotton Collections' Meta access request.

departments_overview.summary: Load across Full Smile (sync bug, 8d), Justice Consumer Law (permissions, 2d), MedStation (GHL onboarding undefined, 9d), Maadi Law (pipeline review, 3d), Steel Round Bars (handoff + directives, 9d), and Unmapped (silent 8d); multiple items stalled mid-cycle.

Widespread stalls: Quality HVAC (31d + 44d), Cotton Collections (Meta access, 2d), MedStation (demographic report, 1d), Maadi Law (3d), Unmapped (3d), Billy Doe Meats (unspecified), and Flow Company (13d); Cotton Collections access request and Full Smile LSA filtering are active.
Justice Consumer Law video content delayed two days; MedStation planning 200 videos/month with patient testimonial requests from doctors.
Full Smile GBP parent item created for local ranking work; Flow Company website SEO update stalled 17 days with no recent activity.

meetings_digest.title: MedStation Content Production
key_points: Meta Ads Strategy: $1,000/test budget per clinic, focus on walk-in patients, Metro Orlando clinic leads in performance due to less competition.
Content Production: 200 videos/month, mix organic/paid; testimonials limited by patient release form issues, doctors to request permissions.
CRM and Data Tracking: New CRM in development to unify tracking calls, WhatsApp, and ad sources; front desk data entry gaps hinder attribution.
Patient Segmentation: Middle-aged Brazilian men and women; hormone treatment attracts men, beauty treatments appeal to women; campaign tailored per clinic.
Operational Coordination: Separate ad accounts per clinic, plan to integrate new CRM with Next Gen system for better tracking and treatment tagging.
action_items: Agencia WeMark
Provide a report on patient demographic data such as age and gender to assess ad targeting effectiveness (05:11)
Have doctors request patient testimonial videos directly on days when Agencia WeMark visits clinics to improve testimonial collection (09:28)
Connect Sohib's team with clinic leaders and front desk staff across all six clinics to enable better communication and data sharing for marketing campaigns (16:50)
Coordinate with clinic leaders to provide detailed insights on patient types per location to tailor marketing campaigns effectively (16:50)
Sohib Boundaoui

meetings_digest.title: Citrus Smiles Marketing Systems
key_points: Full Smile Dental Growth: SEO authority score rose rapidly; Meta ads generated 72 leads with 12 patients; Google Ads $1,000 spend yielded 276 clicks and 15 conversions.
Lead Tracking Automation: GoHighLevel automates texts, appointments, and reviews, tagging sources for quick follow-up and higher conversion rates.
Localized Marketing Strategy: Neighborhood-specific content and segmented Meta ads target parents and locals, building trust before retargeting with service offers.
Specialist Positioning: Doctors highlighted by specialties (e.g., sleep apnea) to build trust and attract targeted patient groups.
Pilot Campaign Plan: Test full marketing system on one office for three months, focusing on ads and CRM with a typical budget around $5,000 monthly.
action_items: Sohib Boundaoui
Send a detailed proposal with pricing, ad spend estimates, and campaign scope for running Google Ads and meta ads for one Citrus Smiles office as a pilot test (26:20)
Coordinate with web SEO team to investigate and implement Google Business Profile update posting strategy to improve Google Maps ranking for Full Smile Dental (15:30)
Gur Simran Aurora
Review received proposal and prepare for a quick follow-up call on Friday morning around 10:30am to discuss potential pilot launch and next steps (26:43)

meetings_digest.title: goh-xgjm-nza
meetings_digest.client: Full Smile, Justice Consumer Law, Cotton Collections, Flow Company
key_points: Lead Quality Issues: JCL leads up to 4/day, but low contact rates cause a push for immediate text follow-up to boost engagement.
Budget & ROI: Bolido Meats sees ROI drop; testing low-priced products and separate campaigns to reduce purchase barriers is urgent.
Campaign Adjustments: Full Smile cuts Meta budget to $40/day, pauses Google Ads, and limits ads to business hours to match intake capacity.
New Client Onboarding: Medstation needs multi-team coordination for six locations; injury attorney has cautious $6,500 budget focused on retargeting.
Video Content Success: Video ads outperform static images; team focusing on short, direct videos, urging more attorney videos to increase leads.

meetings_digest.title: JCL Marketing Sync
key_points: Lead Tracking Fix: Corrected campaign naming error in Zoho CRM, improving lead source clarity and marketing attribution.
Lead Volume & Contact Rates: Lead volume steady at 38 monthly, but contact rates dropped sharply, hurting conversions.
Video Content Impact: Video ads outperformed others, producing 8 leads last week; delays in Rocco’s video content slow growth.
SMS Automation: Plan to launch instant automated texts to new leads, clarifying firm identity and boosting outreach response.
Process Focus: Prioritize SMS setup, push video production, and refine follow-up to improve contact rates and conversions.
action_items: Andrew King
Reach out to Joy to gain admin permissions for Zoho Voice instant messaging setup (18:04)
Investigate Zoho Voice and messaging interfaces to understand SMS and WhatsApp integration capabilities (20:06)
Notify Nacer and team via WhatsApp once permission granted and Zoho Voice ready for automation setup (22:05)
Message Rocco to encourage recording new personalized video content to increase lead engagement and contact rate (16:49)
Nacer Amrouch

meetings_digest.title: Tom Sugar Onboarding
key_points: CRM Integration: Sugar CRM links with Epicor to show real-time quotes and flags inactive accounts, easing sales visibility and reducing department reliance.
User Experience: Navigation glitches and dashboard issues slow adoption; two new developers hired to fix UI and complete features faster.
Data Quality: Migration gaps cause missing or duplicated leads; about 340 accounts lack customer IDs, risking lost outreach and data confusion.
Account Segmentation: Automated flags categorize accounts by purchase recency and value, with alerts for reps to prioritize at-risk customers.
Permissions: Sales reps currently see only assigned accounts; plans exist to widen access cautiously to avoid account poaching.
action_items: Tom Harmon
Test and explore Sugar CRM system functionality, especially accounts, leads, and quotes, then provide feedback (46:50)
Report issues or missing data encountered when using Sugar CRM (46:50)
Sohib Boundaoui
Review Zoho data for void accounts and cleanse before migration to prevent duplicate outreach (08:25)
Investigate Zoho data structure to confirm separation of leads and accounts (10:20)
